title: MR-10 append-only compensation path for Period, Risk, and PC Governance evidence

forbidden_actions: SQL update ledger or snapshot as a correction substitute

steps: If a frozen period snapshot is wrong, append PeriodLateAdjustmentRecorded with reason, actor, and before/after view.
If finance source facts are wrong, create a Correction Center note or correction request and link it to the affected period.
If a risk item is wrong, regenerate RiskCommand from corrected source refs and preserve the prior risk snapshot as evidence.
If export governance was wrong, keep the export audit and append a correction note that references the audit event.
Re-run invariant-runner and shadow-compare-runner after compensation and attach results to the next GateResult.
validation_steps: Verify the original closed period snapshot remains unchanged.
Verify the LateAdjustment is appended and linked to reason, actor, and correction note when applicable.
Verify RiskCommand can drill down to regenerated source refs.
Verify export audit remains visible and is linked to any governance correction.
Verify GateResult evidence maps the compensation to the relevant No-Go item.
